query:
SELECT 
  l.id,
  l.nome,
  l.origem,
  l.status,
  l.origemWebhook,
  l.createdAt,
  CASE WHEN l.origem = 'facebook' AND l.status = 'Aguardando Atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as priority
FROM leads l
INNER JOIN users u ON l.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Guilherme%'
ORDER BY 
  CASE WHEN l.origem = 'facebook' AND l.status = 'Aguardando Atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
  l.origemWebhook DESC,
  l.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 15;

ORDER BY

  l.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 15;
